summary: REQ-1 is substantially implemented. A new Sitemap.tsx component lists all seven required sections (Home, Products, Offers, About, Why Choose Us, Reviews, Contact) as clickable buttons that smooth-scroll to their respective page sections. The Footer.tsx has been updated to open this sitemap in a Dialog modal, making it accessible from footer navigation. The grid layout (1 column on mobile, 2 on sm+) addresses responsive rendering. All acceptance criteria appear to be met.
